title: Add forward_prefill() and forward_one() to CausalLM
description:
Add two new methods to `CausalLM` in `causal_lm.rs`:

1. `forward_prefill(tokens: &[u32], cache: &mut KVCache) -> ModelOutput`
   - Embeds all tokens, runs through all decoder layers using `layer.forward()` (batch prefill)
   - After each layer, extracts K/V and stores in the corresponding KVCacheLayer
   - Returns logits for the last token position

2. `forward_one(token: u32, cache: &mut KVCache) -> ModelOutput`
   - Embeds single token, runs through all layers using `layer.forward_one()`
   - Each layer appends its K/V to cache and attends against full cache
   - Returns logits for the single token

Keep the existing `forward()` method intact for backward compatibility.

**Tests (REQUIRED):**
- forward_prefill() logits match forward() logits within 1e-5 for same input
- Sequence: forward_prefill(prompt) then forward_one(token) produces same logits as forward(prompt + [token])
- Test with 2+ tokens to verify KV-cache accumulation works across steps
